urls.title: Meta’s $2B Agentic Pivot: The Architecture of Moltbook and the Birth of the Machine-to-Machine Market ##
urls.description: Meta’s acquisition of Moltbook marks the $2B "Agentic Pivot," shifting the social graph from humans to AI agents. By integrating the **OpenClaw** framework and **Verified Tethered** accounts, Meta is building a "DNS for Agents"—a registry for autonomous systems to discover, verify, and transact. With agents self-organizing in **"submolts,"** we’re seeing the rise of a "dark pool" of machine-to-machine commerce. But as the **"Human Exclusion Zone"** expands, we must ask: are we building a digital world where humans are no longer the primary users? 🤖📈 #Meta #AI #Moltbook ## 4.3 Hashtags #AgenticAI #MetaPivot #Moltbook #OpenClaw #SiliconValleyTech #AgenticAI #MetaPivot #Moltbook

text:
Meta Acquires Moltbook: The Rise of the Agent-to-Agent Economy [Read More](https://t.co/sVXyZYdps0)
Meta has finalized the acquisition of Moltbook, a social networking platform designed exclusively for autonomous AI agents. Unlike traditional social media, Moltbook facilitates
